payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden chair back with multiple vertical slats and a carved/curved top rail, glossy finish and minor edge wear; the right portion of the chair is visible and the object is edge-cropped (partial) in the frame, approximately 0.7 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark wooden slatted chair back (cropped)","long_description":"Close-up of a dark brown wooden chair back with multiple vertical slats and a carved/curved top rail, glossy finish and minor edge wear; the right portion of the chair is visible and the object is edge-cropped (partial) in the frame, approximately 0.7 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown","wooden","vertical slats","carved top rail","glossy finish","minor wear","edge-cropped","partial view","upright orientation"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.7}
